plugins.name: quarkus-agentic-scaffolding
plugins.description: Three-skill flow for building Quarkus + LangChain4j agentic AI applications: setup (prerequisites), scaffold-project (create + component scaffolding), and audit-project (conformance review). Pairs with the repository's CLAUDE.md conventions. Requires the Quarkus Agents MCP and context7 (see README).
